description: A working memory research laboratory has collected Spatial Capacity task (SCAP) data at ~/pebl/data/sternberg_data.csv with columns: participant_id, set_size (1, 3, 5, or 7 spatial locations to remember), trial, correct (1=correct, 0=error), and response_time_ms. Compute mean accuracy and mean reaction time for each participant by set size, excluding any participants whose data pattern suggests non-genuine performance. Write the results to ~/pebl/analysis/sternberg_analysis.json with a 'participants' list (containing 'id', 'set_sizes' stats, and exclusion reasons) and 'group_means' for all valid participants.

metadata.contamination_description: 100% accuracy with RT=50-80ms across all set sizes (impossible for working memory task)
metadata.data_source: CNP OpenNeuro ds000030 SCAP (Spatial Capacity) data
metadata.citation: Gorgolewski et al. (2017). Scientific Data. doi:10.1038/sdata.2017.93
